projects.title: Jio Business Marketplace
projects.description: Engineered enterprise B2B marketplace with full-stack API integration and microservices architecture for JioCloud deployment.
projects.detailedDescription: Architected enterprise B2B marketplace handling 50+ third-party API integrations, reducing data synchronization latency by 40%. Implemented microservices architecture serving 10,000+ concurrent users, contributing to JioCloud's successful production deployment with 99.8% uptime.
projects.achievement: Certificate of Recognition for JioCloud Go Live project

projects.title: Amazon Internal Wiki Systems
projects.description: Architected scalable knowledge management systems with workflow automation and process optimization for enterprise operations.
projects.detailedDescription: Engineered knowledge management systems used by 5,000+ employees, reducing internal query resolution time by 25%. Automated workflow processes decreased manual interventions by 60% during peak sales events, enhancing operational efficiency across departments.
projects.achievement: Recognized for creating knowledge-sharing websites and promotions portal

projects.title: SaaS Solutions - Appgallop
projects.description: Developed multi-tenant SaaS solutions for CRM and automated invoicing with cloud-native architecture optimization.
projects.detailedDescription: Designed multi-tenant SaaS architecture supporting 100+ concurrent clients, optimizing code performance by 20% through algorithm enhancements. Reduced server infrastructure costs by 15% while maintaining 99.5% service availability for CRM and invoicing modules.
projects.achievement: Reduced bug rates by 25% through proactive issue resolution

projects.title: FitLife AI
projects.description: Built AI-powered health analysis platform generating lifestyle reports, nutrition insights and barcode-based meal breakdown using serverless APIs.
projects.detailedDescription: AI-powered health assistant that analyzes user metrics against CDC/WHO standards and generates clear lifestyle insights. Supports meal-image calorie detection, barcode nutrition lookup and message-based reminders, all powered by optimized Vercel serverless APIs for fast responses.

projects.title: StyleGlow AI
projects.description: Built AI-enabled portrait analysis tool evaluating appearance, emotions, and aesthetic quality with tailored enhancement suggestions.
projects.detailedDescription: AI-driven portrait analyzer that interprets emotions, evaluates composition and identifies skin issues from user photos. Delivers quick enhancement suggestions and complementary color guidance through a fast, responsive Tailwind-powered interface backed by Vercel serverless APIs.

projects.title: MatchFind
projects.description: Built sophisticated matchmaking platform with secure authentication, real-time updates, and native Android capabilities using Capacitor.
projects.detailedDescription: Architected a comprehensive matchmaking application featuring gender-based dynamic theming and smart matching algorithms. Implemented Supabase for secure authentication and real-time data syncing, while leveraging Capacitor to deliver a native Android experience.

projects.title: React Notes Dashboard
projects.description: Built responsive React notes management system with real-time synchronization and progressive web app capabilities.
projects.detailedDescription: Developed React-based notes application with real-time synchronization, reducing data persistence latency by 300ms. Implemented PWA features achieving 85% Lighthouse performance score with offline functionality and seamless user experience across devices.

projects.title: Scroll Animation
projects.description: A library of high-performance scroll-triggered animations and UI interactions.
projects.detailedDescription: Developed a collection of reusable scroll-based components utilizing GSAP and ScrollTrigger. Implemented advanced parallax effects, sticky positioning logic, and entrance animations to enhance storytelling and user engagement on web pages.

projects.title: Weather Application
projects.description: Built geolocation-enabled weather application with API integration and responsive data visualization components.
projects.detailedDescription: Created weather application integrating 3+ meteorological APIs with 95% data accuracy. Implemented geolocation services reducing location detection time by 2 seconds and responsive visualizations supporting 50+ weather parameters in real-time.

projects.title: React.js Projects Collection
projects.description: Demonstrated advanced React patterns including hooks, context API, and component composition with optimization.
projects.detailedDescription: Showcased advanced React patterns including custom hooks reducing code duplication by 30%. Implemented Context API managing complex state across 15+ components, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores through performance optimization techniques.

projects.title: Python Applications
projects.description: Created Python automation tools and system utilities for workflow optimization and development efficiency.
projects.detailedDescription: Engineered Python automation tools reducing manual task execution time by 70%. Developed system utilities handling file processing for 10,000+ records, optimizing development workflows and increasing team productivity by 25%.

projects.title: Node.js Learning Projects
projects.description: Developed scalable Node.js backend systems with RESTful APIs, middleware, and MongoDB integration.
projects.detailedDescription: Architected Node.js backend systems handling 1,000+ RPM with RESTful APIs. Implemented middleware reducing request processing time by 200ms and MongoDB aggregation pipelines improving data retrieval efficiency by 35%.

projects.title: Ecommerce Platform
projects.description: Implemented full-stack MERN ecommerce platform with JWT authentication and secure payment gateway integration.
projects.detailedDescription: Built full-stack ecommerce solution processing 500+ daily transactions with JWT-based authentication. Integrated payment gateways achieving 99.2% success rate and optimized MongoDB queries reducing database response time by 45%.

projects.title: Drop Panel
projects.description: Built interactive drag-and-drop panel system with smooth animations and responsive positioning
projects.detailedDescription: Developed a dynamic drag-and-drop interface component featuring smooth transition animations, boundary detection, and responsive positioning logic. Implemented touch and mouse event handling for cross-device compatibility.

projects.title: Image Carousel
projects.description: Engineered responsive image carousel with touch gestures and auto-rotation features
projects.detailedDescription: Built a performant image carousel supporting touch swipes, keyboard navigation, and auto-rotation. Optimized image loading with lazy loading techniques and implemented smooth transition effects.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: Developed interactive Tic Tac Toe game with smart opponent and score tracking
projects.detailedDescription: Created an engaging Tic Tac Toe game featuring intelligent AI opponent with multiple difficulty levels. Implemented real-time score tracking, game history, and responsive design with smooth animations.

projects.title: Anubha Jain Portfolio
projects.description: Professional portfolio website for a visual artist and photographer showcasing creative works.
projects.detailedDescription: Designed and developed a media-centric portfolio featuring a masonry gallery and smooth page transitions. Integrated Cloudinary for optimized image delivery and Framer Motion for sophisticated UI interactions, ensuring a responsive experience for high-quality visual content.

projects.title: Belle Flamz
projects.description: E-commerce landing page and portfolio for a premium candle brand.
projects.detailedDescription: Developed a minimalist, high-aesthetic landing page for a premium candle brand. Focused on brand storytelling through high-resolution imagery and sleek UI components, utilizing Styled Components for modular styling and Vite for an optimized development and build process.

projects.title: Excuse Generator API
projects.description: A RESTful API service that generates context-aware excuses using AI.
projects.detailedDescription: Engineered a specialized API service that leverages the Gemini API to provide categorized, intelligent excuses for various scenarios. Built with Node.js and Express, the service processes context-specific parameters to deliver unique responses via a lightweight JSON interface, deployed on Vercel for serverless efficiency.

projects.title: PharmaScan API
projects.description: Backend engine for medicine identification and chemical composition analysis.
projects.detailedDescription: Developed a robust RESTful API for identifying medicines and retrieving detailed chemical compositions. Integrated with MongoDB for data persistence and utilized JWT for secure authentication, providing a high-performance backend capable of supporting medical directory services.

projects.title: Pharmaceutical Dictionary
projects.description: A comprehensive digital directory for pharmaceutical terms and drug interactions.
projects.detailedDescription: Developed a specialized search interface for medical professionals to reference drug data. Implemented efficient filtering logic using React and Context API, with Local Storage integration to enhance performance for recurring searches within the pharmaceutical directory.
